title: 257 Text Block

fields.label: Text Block Heading
fields.name: text_block_heading
fields.instructions: Optional large H2 heading shown above the items with a divider line.
fields.placeholder: e.g. Why it feels different from every other space in the city

fields.label: Intro Text
fields.name: text_block_intro
fields.instructions: Optional short line shown between the H2 heading and the divider.
fields.placeholder: e.g. A flexible space designed around you.

fields.label: Column Layout
fields.name: text_block_layout
fields.instructions: Number of columns for the items grid. Stacks to 1 column on mobile.

fields.label: Colour Space Override
fields.name: text_block_colour_space
fields.instructions: Optional. Leave empty to inherit the page or section theme.

fields.label: Force Dark Mode
fields.name: text_block_dark
fields.instructions: Forces dark background with light text, overriding the OS/page colour mode.

fields.label: Card Heading Size
fields.name: text_block_heading_size
fields.instructions: Visual size of H3 subheadings across all items.

fields.label: Card Text Size
fields.name: text_block_text_size
fields.instructions: Body text size applied to all items. Large uses the step-up size; Medium uses the base size.

fields.label: Primary Button
fields.name: text_block_primary_button
fields.instructions: Optional primary CTA button shown below the items grid.

fields.label: Secondary Button
fields.name: text_block_secondary_button
fields.instructions: Optional secondary button shown alongside the primary.

fields.label: Text Items
fields.name: text_block_items
fields.instructions: Add one item per text block. Items flow into the column grid.

sub_fields.label: Subheading
sub_fields.name: heading
sub_fields.instructions: Optional H3 subheading above the body text. Leave empty to omit.

sub_fields.label: Body
sub_fields.name: body
sub_fields.instructions: Main body text for this item.

description: Large H2 heading with a divider, followed by a 2- or 3-column grid of text items with optional subheadings.
